    COMPREHENSIVE DENTAL CARE

    We’re dedicated to delivering top-quality dental care tailored to meet the unique needs of each patient. Our Comprehensive Dental Care Plan covers a full spectrum of services, ensuring that you and your family receive thorough, effective care for optimal oral health. Explore our wide range of treatments designed to keep your smile healthy, beautiful, and resilient

    GENERAL & PREVENTATIVE DENTISTRY

    Regular comprehensive exams at Omnia Dental are essential for maintaining optimal oral health and preventing potential issues before they escalate.


    During these appointments, our highly trained dentists conduct a thorough evaluation of your teeth, gums, and mouth, checking for signs of decay, gum disease, or other oral health concerns that may impact your overall well-being. The exam goes beyond just your teeth, as we also examine your jaw alignment and bite to detect issues that could lead to discomfort or even TMJ disorders.





    Early detection of oral cancer can be life-saving, which is why Omnia Dental Clinic prioritizes oral cancer screenings as a critical part of our comprehensive exam process. Our screenings detect abnormalities in the mouth, throat, and surrounding tissues that might indicate the presence of cancer.




    At Omnia Dental Clinic, our dental cleaning procedures integrate Biofilm Therapy, a leading-edge technique that targets and removes harmful biofilm from the mouth. Biofilm, a sticky layer of bacteria, can accumulate on your teeth and gums, increasing the risk of cavities, gum disease, and bad breath.




    Fluoride treatments and dental sealants at Omnia Dental Clinic are essential preventive measures that play a significant role in protecting your teeth from decay and strengthening enamel. Fluoride is a natural mineral that, when applied to the teeth, strengthens them against acid attacks from bacteria and sugary foods. This treatment is particularly beneficial for children and individuals at higher risk of tooth decay.




    Omnia Dental Clinic is dedicated to creating a welcoming and comfortable environment for young patients, helping to make dental visits enjoyable and stress-free. By using child-friendly approaches, we focus on easing any dental anxiety your child may have and ensure they have a positive experience.




    When dental emergencies arise unexpectedly, Omnia Dental Clinic is here to provide swift and effective care, ensuring you receive prompt relief and compassionate treatment. Whether you’re experiencing a severe toothache, chipped or broken tooth, or any other urgent issue, our staff is prepared to assess your situation quickly.




    Root canal therapy at Omnia Dental Clinic is a crucial treatment for saving teeth that are severely decayed or infected, alleviating pain, and preserving your natural smile. During a root canal procedure, our team carefully removes the infected pulp from the tooth’s interior, then cleans and seals the area to prevent further infection.




    Dental crowns from are custom-made restorations that reinforce damaged teeth, restoring both functionality and aesthetics to your smile. The process begins with a thorough examination and imaging to assess the tooth’s condition. We then prepare the affected tooth and take precise impressions to create a crown that matches the look and feel of your natural teeth.




    Made to match your natural teeth, these fillings repair cavities discreetly while providing strength and durability. Tooth-colored fillings are a natural-looking solution for repairing cavities or minor damage, blending seamlessly with your teeth. Unlike traditional silver fillings, composite fillings are closely matched to the natural colour of your teeth, ensuring a discreet and attractive appearance.




    Tooth extraction is sometimes necessary to maintain overall oral health, especially in cases of severe decay, damage, or overcrowding. Our approach at Omnia Dental ensures extractions are performed with precision and care, prioritizing your comfort throughout the procedure. Extractions can alleviate pain, prevent the spread of infection, and create space for proper alignment when planning orthodontic treatments.




    Wisdom tooth removal is often necessary to prevent overcrowding, impaction, or discomfort. At Omnia Dental, we provide gentle, precise extractions to ensure both comfort and safety. Wisdom teeth—also known as third molars—can cause problems when there’s not enough room for them to grow properly, potentially leading to pain, infection, or misalignment.




    COSMETIC DENTISTRY

    Dental veneers are a transformative option for those looking to improve chipped, discoloured, or slightly misaligned teeth. These custom-made shells are bonded to the front of your teeth, creating an instantly refreshed look.




    Laser gum contouring is a minimally invasive procedure to reshape and redefine your gum line, ideal for creating a balanced, attractive smile. This treatment is especially beneficial for patients with a “gummy” smile or uneven gum lines.




    Professional teeth whitening is a safe and effective way to achieve a brighter smile, removing years of discolouration caused by age, diet, or lifestyle habits. Our in-office treatments use high-quality whitening agents that deliver noticeable results in less time compared to over-the-counter options.




    Clear aligners provide a discreet, comfortable option for straightening teeth, ideal for adults and teens seeking a metal-free solution. These custom aligners gently and gradually shift teeth into the desired position, improving alignment and addressing bite issues over time.




    Dental bonding is a versatile cosmetic treatment used to repair minor imperfections like chips, cracks, or gaps, enhancing the shape and appearance of your teeth. Using a tooth-coloured composite resin, our team skillfully sculpts and shapes the material to create a seamless, natural look that complements your smile.




    Digital Smile Design (DSD) is an innovative approach that uses advanced digital imaging to create a personalized plan for your smile makeover. This cutting-edge technology allows you to visualize potential results before committing to treatment, offering a highly customized experience that’s tailored to your aesthetic goals.




    ICON resin infiltration is a minimally invasive treatment designed to improve the appearance of white spots and other surface imperfections on teeth, often caused by early decay or enamel irregularities. Unlike traditional drilling or veneers, ICON treatment preserves more of your natural tooth structure, making it a gentle and effective solution for those who want to enhance their smile without major procedures.




    RESTORATIVE DENTISTRY

    Dental bridges offer an effective way to replace one or more missing teeth, restoring both function and appearance. These custom-made restorations are anchored to surrounding teeth or implants, filling gaps and helping prevent shifting. A well-crafted bridge improves bite alignment, maintains facial shape, and provides a natural look.




    For patients with several missing teeth, partial and full dentures offer a practical, attractive solution. Partials fill in sections of missing teeth and attach to surrounding natural teeth, while full dentures replace all teeth on the upper or lower arch. Both are custom-designed to fit comfortably, allowing you to enjoy a functional smile again




    Dental implants offer an effective way to provide structure for one or more missing teeth, restoring both function and appearance. These surgical restorations act as anchors for crowns and/or bridges, filling gaps and helping prevent shifting. A well-placed implant improves bite alignment, maintains facial shape, and provides a natural look.




    NO FREEZE/NO DRILL FILLINGS WITH SOLEA

    Our no-freeze, no-drill Solea laser technology offers a virtually painless alternative to traditional fillings, making treatment both quick and comfortable. This advanced option is ideal for patients seeking a gentle and stress-free dental experience.





    Our no-freeze, no-drill Solea laser technology offers a virtually painless alternative to traditional fillings, making treatment both quick and comfortable. This advanced option is ideal for patients seeking a gentle and stress-free dental experience.





    Our no-freeze, no-drill Solea laser technology offers a virtually painless alternative to traditional fillings, making treatment both quick and comfortable. This advanced option is ideal for patients seeking a gentle and stress-free dental experience.





    FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

    Omnia Dental Clinic is at 5005 Mullen Rd NW, Edmonton, AB T6R 0S9, serving South Edmonton families with compassionate care. We're conveniently located for checkups, cleanings, and emergencies.​

    Omnia Dental Clinic stands out as the top family dental clinic in South Edmonton, offering personalized care for all ages in a friendly atmosphere. From kids' first visits to adult implants, we prioritize comfort and excellence.​

    Yes, Omnia Dental provides advanced Solea laser dentistry in South Edmonton for drill-free, no-freeze fillings and soft tissue procedures. This technology ensures pain-free treatments with quick recovery for patients of all ages.​

    Omnia Dental Clinic in South Edmonton offers comprehensive services including exams, cleanings with Biofilm Therapy, root canals, crowns, extractions, fluoride treatments, and emergency care—all tailored to your needs.​

    Solea laser treatment at Omnia Dental uses a unique wavelength for precise, gentle cutting of teeth and gums without drills or anesthesia. Procedures like fillings are fast, blood-free, and anxiety-free.​

    Omnia Dental's Solea laser dentist in South Edmonton delivers drill-free dentistry for fillings, gum surgeries, and desensitization. Enjoy minimal discomfort, no needles, and immediate return to daily activities.​

    Omnia Dental provides restorative dentistry in South Edmonton, including tooth-colored fillings, dental crowns, root canals, and extractions. These restore function and aesthetics with precision and comfort.​

    Omnia Dental follows the Alberta Dental Fee Guide for transparent pricing. We accept direct insurance billing, major credit cards, and flexible payment plans—discuss options during your visit.​

    Book online or call Omnia Dental Clinic in South Edmonton for new patient exams. No referral needed; we offer same-day emergencies and welcome walk-ins for urgent care.​

    Omnia Dental offers warranties on restorative work like crowns and fillings per Alberta guidelines. Follow-up care ensures lasting results—schedule maintenance visits for ongoing support.
